title: Deduction questions D11-D15
description: How to complete the deduction questions D11 to D15 in your paper supplementary tax return.

child_links.title: D11 Deductible amount of undeducted purchase price of a foreign pension or annuity 2016
child_links.description: Complete question D11 to claim a deduction for the undeducted purchase price for a foreign pension or annuity.

child_links.title: D12 Personal superannuation contributions 2016
child_links.description: Complete question D12 to claim a personal superannuation contributions deduction.

child_links.title: D13 Deduction for project pool 2016
child_links.description: Complete question D13 to claim a deduction for certain capital expenditure allocated to a project pool.

child_links.title: D14 Forestry managed investment scheme deduction 2016
child_links.description: Complete question D14 to claim a deduction for payments made to a forestry managed investment scheme.

child_links.title: D15 Other deductions - not claimable at items D1 to D14 or elsewhere on your tax return 2016
child_links.description: Complete question D15 to claim expenses you haven't been able to claim at D1 to D14 or elsewhere in your tax return.

child_links.title: Total supplement deductions 2016
child_links.description: Complete the total supplement deductions section of your supplementary tax return.
